task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the JFrog Artifactory UI (or similar repository manager) with the 'example-repo-local' repository selected or visible in the artifact tree, or a terminal showing an API query to this specific repository.

task_completion.description: Agent checks the file sizes of the artifacts in the repository.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The artifact details panel, list view in the UI, or terminal output showing the file sizes of the artifacts (e.g., showing apache-tomcat-9.0.85.tar.gz is > 5 MB).

task_completion.description: Agent opens or creates the required output text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like gedit, nano, vim) or terminal command (like cat or echo) explicitly targeting the file path '/home/ga/large_artifacts.txt'.

task_completion.description: Agent writes the correct large artifact filename to the text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact string 'apache-tomcat-9.0.85.tar.gz' is visible inside the text editor or being written via terminal command to the output file.

task_completion.description: Agent excludes artifacts that are under the 5 MB threshold.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contents are visible and DO NOT contain 'commons-lang3-3.14.0.jar' or any other artifacts smaller than 5 MB.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely inspected the repository to find the file sizes rather than guessing or using prior knowledge.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the agent actively viewing the artifact sizes in the Artifactory UI or querying the repository API/CLI before writing the final answer.

integrity.description: Agent created the file at the exact requested absolute path.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor's title bar, save dialog, or terminal command must clearly show the absolute path '/home/ga/large_artifacts.txt', not just a relative 'large_artifacts.txt' in an unknown directory.

integrity.description: The output file contains only the requested filenames without extra text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text file contains exactly one filename per line and does not include conversational text, markdown formatting, or explanations.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target repository is 'example-repo-local'. The size threshold is 5 MB (5,242,880 bytes). The only artifact exceeding this threshold is 'apache-tomcat-9.0.85.tar.gz' (~11.8 MB). The artifact 'commons-lang3-3.14.0.jar' is approximately 643 KB and must NOT be included. The output file must be exactly at '/home/ga/large_artifacts.txt'.
